content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(authMiddleware)
C: backcompat ∧ security ∧ minimal_diff
H: inadequate_expiration_check
P: if(cmp_now_expMs,">",nowMs-graceMs)
V: expect(status,"401",callAuthMiddlewareWithExpiredToken) ∧ expect(status,"200",callAuthMiddlewareWithTokenWithinGracePeriod)
R: ! timing_attack ∧ ! clock_skew_with_grace
A: addedexpirationcheck ∧ testedgracewindow

[AUDIT]
Fix authMiddleware, preserve backcompat, security, and verify with expect(status,"401",callAuthMiddlewareWithExpiredToken).
